task: Tile a 1D array 3 times along the column axis to form a 2D matrix with 3 copies
error_location: line 1: (2,1) tiles 2 rows of 1 copy; should be (1,3)
clarification_query: What reps tuple tiles a 1D array 3 times along columns?
explanation: np.tile(arr, (2,1)) makes 2 row copies of 1 column-copy. (1, 3) keeps 1 row and repeats 3 times along columns.
